title: How to reset your password
content: To reset your password, go to the login page and click 'Forgot Password'. Enter your registered email address and you will receive a password reset link within 5 minutes. If you don't receive the email, check your spam folder or contact support.

title: Refund policy overview
content: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on all subscriptions. Refunds are processed within 5-10 business days after approval. Partial refunds may be issued based on usage. Contact billing support to initiate a refund request.

title: API rate limits
content: Our API allows 1000 requests per minute for standard tier, 5000 for premium tier, and 20000 for enterprise tier. Rate limits are calculated on a rolling 60-second window. If you exceed the limit, you will receive a 429 Too Many Requests response.

title: How to upgrade your plan
content: Go to Settings > Billing > Plan and click 'Upgrade'. Your new plan will be effective immediately and the difference will be prorated. Downgrades take effect at the end of the current billing cycle.

title: Common error codes and solutions
content: Error 400: Invalid request parameters. Check your JSON payload. Error 401: Authentication failed. Verify your API key. Error 403: Insufficient permissions. Contact admin. Error 500: Internal server error. Wait and retry.

title: Payment methods accepted
content: We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, PayPal, and bank transfers (for enterprise plans). All payments are processed securely through Stripe. We do not store your credit card information.
